'''Brafid''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] who worked as an officer on the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']] and was, therefore, permitted to walk around the vessel while armed. His weapon of choice was a type of electric prod that he liked to refer to as a "[[tingler]]." He was close friends with [[Nooni Dalvo]]. During [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] escape from the ''Luck'', Brafid was shot by the young [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]].

==Behind the scenes==
There is contradiction as to what Brafid's species actually is. While in [[The Paradise Snare]] he said to be an Elomin, and is described as being hulking, and furred. However, this more accurately describes an [[Elom/Legends|Elom]], as Elomins are relatively hairless (with minor hair behind their ears) and stand an average of 1.6 meters.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
